title: Webhooks open beta
excerpt:
Hello everyone, 
I am happy to announce that you can now integrate Webhooks with your monday.com account! The integration is currently open for our Beta users. :slight_smile: 
Go check it out! 
You can use Webhooks eithe…

posts.author: ran-monday.com (Ran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,
I am happy to announce that you can now integrate Webhooks with your monday.com account! The integration is currently open for our Beta users.
Go check it out!
You can use Webhooks either from our API v2 or from the integration store.
If you are interested in trying it out, email our support team at support@monday.com with the subject line monday.com Webhooks integration!
documentation : monday.com Webhooks

posts.author: Miltime19 (Adam Miller)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to select which column yet with it the webhook? As for now any change made for any column triggers the webhook.

posts.author: PabloVerano (Pablo Verano)
posts.cookedHtml:
No, there’s no way to select specific columns to use as trigger for the webhook.

I am using it to track offline conversions on Google Analytics and had to settle for adding filters on the receiving end of the webhook to decide which specific changes will go through.
